root.name: Rotate the architectural diagram image 45 degrees clockwise on slide 6
root.description: Evaluates whether the architectural diagram image on slide 6 was correctly rotated 45 degrees clockwise, with no unintended side effects.

children.name: Correct image rotated 45 degrees clockwise on slide 6
children.description: Checks that the architectural diagram image on slide 6 was rotated exactly 45 degrees clockwise.

children.name: Image is present and rotated 45 degrees clockwise
children.description: Checks that the architectural diagram image is still present and has been rotated 45 degrees clockwise.

children.name: No other unintended slide content changes
children.description: Checks that no other content (text, objects, animations, etc.) changed on slide 6 or elsewhere except the intended image rotation.

children.name: No changes to animations or transitions on slide 6
children.description: Ensures no animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified on slide 6.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Use ppt_diff
    slide_num = 6
    # Animations
    affected_animations = [ae for ae in ppt_diff.added_animations + ppt_diff.removed_animations
                           if int(ae.slide_id) == slide_num]
    affected_animations += [ae for before, after in ppt_diff.modified_animations
                            if int(before.slide_id) == slide_num or int(after.slide_id) == slide_num]
    # Transitions
    affected_transitions = [tr for tr in ppt_diff.added_transitions + ppt_diff.removed_transitions
                            if int(tr.slide_id) == slide_num]
    affected_transitions += [tr for before, after in ppt_diff.modified_transitions
                             if int(before.slide_id) == slide_num or int(after.slide_id) == slide_num]
    if affected_animations or affected_transitions:
        return (f"Animations/Transitions changed on slide 6: Animations: {len(affected_animations)}, Transitions: {len(affected_transitions)}", 0.0)
    return ("No animation or transition changes on slide 6.", 1.0)

children.name: No changes to other slides
children.description: Ensures that slides other than slide 6 were not changed in any way.

children.name: No extraneous images added to slide 6
children.description: Checks that no new images were added to slide 6.

metadata.task: Rotate the architectural diagram image 45 degrees clockwise on slide 6
